description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in dark red shingles. The exterior walls are constructed from vertically planked wood, featuring visible metal fasteners and a dark stone foundation. The front facade has a centered rectangular doorway accessed by a short wooden staircase, with no visible door attached. Small, square windows are distributed along the side walls, providing minimal natural light and a sense of security. The roof has a pronounced overhang, offering some protection to the entryway and windows from the elements. The overall appearance suggests a simple, utilitarian structure suitable for rural or forested urban edge environments.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a steep red-shingled gable roof, small square windows, and a central front entry accessed by stairs. The exterior features dark wood planks and a stone foundation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the steep gable roof, central doorway with stairs, and no visible windows on the front facade.
description_view_1: Side view displaying three small square windows evenly spaced along the wooden wall, with the roof's overhang clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear gable end with no visible doors or windows, highlighting the roof's pitch and the texture of the wooden planks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with three small square windows, mirroring the window arrangement of the other side.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with steep pitch and dark red shingles, pronounced overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: three small square windows evenly spaced along each side wall, no windows on front or rear facades, symmetrical distribution
attribute_door_placement: single exterior doorway centered on the front facade, accessed by a short staircase
